titleStmt.title: SII 37.471: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 471. (A.R. No. B 40 of 1942-43.) Siddhēśvaram, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Another pillar built into the platform of the Āshur-khāna.

It registers a gift of some Vṛittis of land in two villages made by Māmala Mallaya, a feudatory of the king to god Visavanātha at Siddhēśvaram whose temple was constructed in the name of Viśvēśvara Śivadēva, the Rājaguru of Gaṇapatidēva Mahārāju. The management of the endowed land was handed over to Pōchirāju Veṅgana Pegaḍa, the agent of Vidyāśivadēva, who was the sthānapati of Saṁgamēśvara and Bhāskarakshētra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigata paṁcamahā śa
bda mahāmaṁḍalēśvara Anuma
koṁḍa puravarādhīśvara parama
māhēśvara śrī svayaṁbhūdē
va divya śrīpādapadmārādhaka
parabalasādhaka nāmādi
samasta praśastisahitaṁ
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
kākatīya gaṇapatidēva ma
hārāju Ōrugaṁṭi su
kha saṁkathā vinōdaṁbulaṁ
bṛthivi rājyaṁbu sēyu
cuṁḍaṁgā tatpādapadmō
pajīviyaina śrīmatu
māmala mallaya gaṇapati
dēvamahārāju rājagu
rulu viśvēśvara śivadēvara pē
ranu siddēśvarāna guḍi
Ettiṁci pratiṣṭha sēsina vi
śvanāthadēvara Aṁgaraṁga

Ūṭa cēnu Āgara
lanu kha 2 paḍuma
ṭi Āgara ce[Ē]ṟu
dālakānu Uttarāna Ēṟu
tūrppunanu battu da
kṣiṇāna bilamu Eṟa
ṁguṁṭa cēnu kha 1 dīniki
sīma paḍumaṭa teruvu
teruma paḍumaṭanu
Oka guḍḍāmu galadu Ū
ttarāna gaṭṭu tūrppu
na jakkasāni guḍḍamu
dakṣiṇāna baṁḍideruvu
ciṁtala cēnuma dīniki
sīma paḍumaṭa Ottu U
ttarāna Eṟu tūrppuna O
ttu dakṣiṇāna gaṭṭu
8 Ī dēvarakanivriti saṁ
gamēśvaramu bhāskarakṣētra
Āsthānapati vidyāśivadē
vara pegaḍa pōcirāju
veṁganapegaḍala cētanu
nī vritti tūrpuna nēraṭū
ranu ga 100 veṭṭi ceṟuvu
gaṭṭiṁci dīnivenuka
krayamugoṁna
vrēlivō

Ī reṁḍūḍla vrittūlūnu
puvvala mallayānu Ā
yana saṁtānamūṁgalaṁ
ta kālamu vāre naḍasedaru
Aṭimīṁdanu siddēścvaramu
vāru tamaŪraguḍi yī
dēmunkannadi gadā Ani
vritti kiṁdagalareṁḍu
vrittivārūnū tama Ūra
polamuṁgala munu
naḍigaḍāla siddēśvaramu
vāri kaḍagula tādura Ani
Ūrivrittula recelpidi
Ī guḍlu gaṭṭiṁcina dīnnī banki
ṟvuga gaṭiṁcina dīnni sū
ryyadēvara dhanamu dī
nevvaru gonnānu Ādēva
tānu tāru neṟṟuṁguduru
Digital edition of SII 37.471 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
